lines: What is it Eddie, is it time for another party already?
In a manner of speaking yes - right here on our ship
Great, who did I invite again??
No one in particular, but since you clearly dont remember let me remind you-
AS I was trying to saaay, after your last night's bender, you decided, against my whishes, that that was the best time to try and figure out the IID. In doing so you-
Wow wow wow, the IID? Cmon choom I'm still scraping my brain together, you know what - turn on exposition mode
The IID, or the Infinite improbability drive - is the main source of our abillity to travel all the infinite posibilities of the universe by manipulating reality until we reach our destination.
As I was saying, in your altered state you decided to mess with it and in doing so, invited all manner of creatures onboard
No. Some of them grabbed the required parts needed to repair the IID, and all of them are in a state of frenzy and confusion as to where they are and what happened.
But fret not captain - while you were out cold from your... Activities, I crafted tools you can use to manually send everyone back to their home dimension and or timeline...
